queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the association between lacking a checking account and mitigated credit default probability.
Investigation into applicant age as a significant driver of increased credit risk and default likelihood.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: savings below 100 DM.
queries.question: Statistical evidence regarding savings balances below 100 DM and their correlation with reduced credit risk.
